title: Fuse
abstract: A fuse with an improved arc elimination performance is provided while an increase in the total length of the fuse element is prevented. A fuse500includes a fuse element100including at least one fusing portion120between terminal portions110on both sides. The fuse element100includes curved portions130, which are hollowed, at positions adjacent to the fusing portion120. An arc-eliminating material140is fastened in hollowed portions131of the curved portions130.
claims: 1. A fuse comprising a fuse element including at least one fusing portion between terminal portions on both sides, wherein the fuse element includes curved portions, which define hollowed portions, at positions adjacent to the fusing portion, and an arc-eliminating material is applied only on an internal surface of the hollowed portions and fastened in the hollowed portions of the curved portions.
